---
title: "SDS Lab Website Completed"
subtitle: "Quarto-based Homepage Launch"
author: "GIS Lab"
date: "2026-02-28"
categories: [Website, Announcements]
image: "images/webhome.png"
toc: false
---

![](images/webhome.png)

## SDS Lab website Lanch

The updated website now presents a complete overview of our research in Spatial Data Science, GeoAI, GIS, and Geospatial Analytics, including detailed project descriptions, publications, and team information.

We hope this platform will serve as a clear and professional representation of our research activities and future directions.
